2606.22346.title: Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling for Function-Space Regression and Inverse Problems
2606.22346.paper_summary: Principled regression for stochastic processes is a long-standing challenge with deep connections to scientific inverse problems. We introduce Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS), to our knowledge the first function-space posterior sampling framework that unifies stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems. Built on pretrained function-space flow-matching priors, FAPS enables likelihood-guided posterior inference from sparse and noisy observations, supports variable query discretizations, and avoids explicit prior-density evaluation. Its Langevin correction uses a low-rank covariance preconditioner to exploit dominant function-space correlations across discretizations. Across Gaussian and non-Gaussian stochastic-process regression benchmarks and diverse PDE inverse problems, FAPS produces coherent posterior samples with accurate uncertainty quantification, significantly outperforming existing functional regression baselines and achieving competitive or better PDE noisy inverse performance than diffusion-based posterior samplers while reducing test-time sampling cost.
2606.22346.paper_summary_zh: 原則性回歸在隨機過程中是一個長期以來的挑戰，與科學反問題有著深厚的聯繫。<lb/>我們介紹了流退火後驗採樣（Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling，FAPS），據我們所知，這是第一個統一隨機過程回歸和偏微分方程反問題的函數空間後驗採樣框架。<lb/>FAPS 基於預訓練的函數空間流匹配先驗，使得從稀疏和噪聲觀察中進行似然引導的後驗推斷成為可能，支持變量查詢離散化，並避免顯式的先驗密度評估。<lb/>其朗之萬修正使用低秩協方差預處理器，以利用離散化之間的主導函數空間相關性。<lb/>在高斯和非高斯隨機過程回歸基準以及各種偏微分方程反問題中，FAPS 產生了一致的後驗樣本，並提供準確的不確定性量化，顯著超越現有的函數回歸基準，並在偏微分方程噪聲反問題上達到與基於擴散的後驗採樣器相當或更好的性能，同時降低測試時間採樣成本。
2606.22346.author: Yaozhong Shi et.al.
2606.22346.authors: Yaozhong Shi, Zachary E. Ross, Yisong Yue
